description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 11, 2025 at 12:58 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on S. Bronson Avenue at S. Adams Boulevard. 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing west on S. Adams Boulevard in the left lane when it made a left turn at the intersection at S. Bronson 
Avenue. As the Waymo AV was completing the left turn to continue southbound on S. Bronson Avenue, a passenger car that was initially 
parked at the curb facing south on S. Bronson Avenue entered the roadway and the front left side of the passenger car made contact with the 
rear right side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both 
vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
